basic_details.job_title: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has published the Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 to fill 1 Senior Research Fellow position. Candidates with a maximum age of 40 years and holding an M.Sc. (Ag. Economics.) or M.Sc. (Ag. Statistics.) with a 4-year Bachelor's Degree from an ICAR-accredited University are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 24-07-2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and walk-in details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: Not exceeding 35 years for men and 40 years for women.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Ag. Economics.) / M.Sc. (Ag. Statistics.) with 4 years of Bachelor's Degree from ICAR accredited University.
qualification.details: M.Sc. (Ag. Economics.) / M.Sc. (Ag. Statistics.) with 4 years of Bachelor's Degree from ICAR accredited University.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ANGRAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Details
ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc. (Ag. Economics.) / M.Sc. (Ag. Statistics.) with 4 years of Bachelor's Degree from ICAR accredited University.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: Not exceeding 35 years for men and 40 years for women.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ANGRAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Senior Research Fellow. This is a contract-based position within the university.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Ag. Economics or M.Sc. in Ag. Statistics, along with a 4-year Bachelor's Degree from an ICAR accredited University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for male candidates is 35 years, and for female candidates, it is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form might also be required.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the location for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. The specific venue details will be in the official notification.
